title: AtHome Function
description: The AtHome function returns if the current robot orientation is Home position or not. To register the Home position, use HomeSet command or Robot Manager. To move to the Home position, use the Home command.
see_also:
Returns if the current robot is in its Home position or not.

Home

AtHome Function Example

Function main

  Boolean hm

  hm = AtHome()

Fend
examples:
Function main Boolean hm hm = AtHome()
Fend
